diagrams.title: Eulerian Path vs Circuit
diagrams.description: Shows the difference between Eulerian path (starts and ends at different vertices) and Eulerian circuit (returns to start)
elements: Edge AB, BC, CA forming triangle with extra edge
diagrams.purpose: Visualize degree conditions for Eulerian paths and circuits

diagrams.title: Hamiltonian Cycle in K4
diagrams.description: Complete graph K4 with one Hamiltonian cycle highlighted
elements: All other edges shown as chords
diagrams.purpose: Understand Hamiltonian cycle structure in complete graphs

diagrams.title: Fleury's Algorithm Bridge Concept
diagrams.description: Demonstrates bridge identification in a graph during Eulerian path construction
diagrams.purpose: Learn to identify bridges when applying Fleury's Algorithm
